provenance.purpose: CONTROLLED SUBSET for the G2 integration run. Not the production index.
provenance.why: Sourcing ranks by effective score, and the 100-score vendors in the full index publish no request schema. Pointing a live run at them would send a generic body, earn a 400, and pay for it. This subset contains only the vendor that documents its own schema, so G2 tests the chain rather than the marketplace-wide schema gap.
provenance.source: data/vendor-index.json, filtered to agent 2023 / the documented Address Balance Snapshot service
provenance.do_not_use_for: the demo or the listing; use data/vendor-index.json
